products.name: Kandla Grey Indian Sandstone Paving Slabs - Project Pack
products.description: Premium Kandla Grey Indian Sandstone. Offers a beautiful traditional finish with hand-dressed edges and a natural riven surface. Calibrated to 22mm thickness for ease of installation.

products.name: Kandla Grey Indian Sandstone Paving Slabs - 900x600mm
products.description: Large format single-sized Kandla Grey Indian Sandstone slabs. Features clean hand-cut riven textures and uniform cool grey tones for a premium modern landscape feel.

products.name: Raj Green Indian Sandstone Paving Slabs - Project Pack
products.description: Authentic Raj Green Indian Sandstone. Blends classic green, warm brown, and natural grey shades to mimic traditional English Yorkstone layouts. Hand-dressed 22mm calibrated slabs.

products.name: Raj Green Indian Sandstone Paving Slabs - 900x600mm
products.description: Sleek large-format 900x600mm Raj Green Sandstone flags. Natural riven textures with warm khaki and stone grey variation. Calibrated 22mm for perfect patio leveling.

products.name: Rippon Buff Indian Sandstone Paving Slabs - Project Pack
products.description: Warm and inviting Rippon Buff Sandstone paving packs. Displaying a rich mix of cream, beige, golden buff, and pinkish vein patterns. Ideal for brightening darker garden layouts.

products.name: Rippon Buff Indian Sandstone Paving Slabs - 900x600mm
products.description: Stunning large-format single size Rippon Buff paving flags. Calibrated 22mm thickness. Bright sand textures with distinct orange and gold swirl details.

products.name: Autumn Brown Indian Sandstone Paving Slabs - Project Pack
products.description: Classic Autumn Brown natural stone flags. Riven cleft textures containing warm earthy browns, hazelnut, and dark grey tones. Fully calibrated 22mm slabs.

products.name: Autumn Brown Indian Sandstone Paving Slabs - 900x600mm
products.description: Large 900x600mm format Autumn Brown sandstone tiles. Earthy tones provide a warm, cozy feeling for classic country garden patios.

products.name: County Anthracite Porcelain Paving Slabs
products.description: Premium dark anthracite vitrified outdoor porcelain. Modern anti-slip fine textured surface, sawn clean edges. Extremely durable and stain-resistant.

products.name: Hammer Stone Grey Porcelain Paving Slabs
products.description: Textured Hammer Stone Grey vitrified porcelain paving. Replicates natural split stones with zero maintenance and excellent wet weather traction.

products.name: Mountain White Porcelain Paving Slabs
products.description: Ultra-modern off-white vitrified porcelain. Creates an extremely bright, spacious, and luxurious feel for high-end modern garden builds.

products.name: Earth Core Grey Porcelain Slabs
products.description: Vitrified porcelain with a sleek concrete-grey mineral appearance. Perfect for minimal indoor-outdoor floor designs.

products.name: Quartz Light Grey Porcelain Slabs
products.description: Features a quartz-veined mineral aesthetic in a bright, modern grey tone. Frost proof, slip proof R11 vitrified construction.

products.name: Kandla Grey Porcelain Slabs
products.description: Replicates the famous cool grey natural sandstone look, but with the high performance and low maintenance of vitrified porcelain.

products.name: Quartz White Porcelain Paving
products.description: Pure white vitrified porcelain flags with light marble-like quartz veining. R11 slip rating. Creates clean lines and bright modern garden zones.

products.name: Persia Beige Porcelain Paving Slabs
products.description: Sleek beige-toned porcelain slabs with highly detailed stone-vein finishes. High load capacity, frost resistant, and moss proof.
